title: Avoid full rollout on fernet/credential key rotation
summary: Review #3 feedback from gndrmnn addressed correctly: (1) the pointless TestBuildKeystoneDeployment_NoHashAnnotations test was deleted entirely, and (2) the superfluous phrase 'confirming the hash computation path is removed' was trimmed from the TestReconcileDeployment_NoSecretReadRequired comment. All remaining CC-0074 tests pass, go vet is clean. No new issues introduced.
